diagrams.title: F-Distribution Shapes for Different Degrees of Freedom
diagrams.description: Shows how F-distribution changes shape as degrees of freedom increase
elements: Vertical line at F=1 showing center reference
diagrams.purpose: Understand how F-distribution shape transforms from skewed to symmetric as degrees of freedom increase

diagrams.title: F-Test Decision Regions
diagrams.description: Illustration of rejection and acceptance regions for F-test
elements: Rejection region (shaded right tail): F > F-critical
Text labels for α level and degrees of freedom
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the decision rule for hypothesis testing using F-distribution

diagrams.title: ANOVA Partition of Variance
diagrams.description: Visual representation showing how total variance is decomposed in ANOVA
elements: Arrows showing partition: SST = SSB + SSW
diagrams.purpose: Understand the conceptual basis of how ANOVA uses F-distribution to test mean differences
